subject: Re: Jeffrey!
body:
come as soon as you can

----- Original Message ----
From: balerina simona <balerinasimona@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, June 22, 2007 10:51:43 AM
Subject: Jeffrey!


Dear Jeffrey, my gratefulness for you is endless. Thank you for 
every day, every hour and  every minute. Great thanks from my family too.
   I am doing fine. I am very happy to be here, but so pity that the time 
goes so fast. Every day I have class of ballet, it’s hard to believe, but I 
have big pleasure during exercises. Before two weeks I had the last 
performance, one ballet company in Geneva asked me to dance!!! After that it 
was very nice to get compliments from audience and artists. I got flowers 
too. But the most wonderful feeling that I got possibility to feel the stage 
again. Doesn’t matter that my role was not leading, but I gave all that I 
have inside me.
Next week I am going to take a class in Grand Theater de Geneva. I will try 
to speak with director about opportunity to get a job for next season in his 
company! I still have hopes.
   Jeffrey, if your suggestion still stands good about my trip to NY, I can 
come with big join!!! I missed to do feet massage for you, I missed Dana, I 
missed that huge city… Just before I would like to visit my family in 
Lithuania for few weeks.
    I hope that you are happy, that every thing is perfect in your live. Big 
hug, big kiss. I hope to see you soon. Lots of love. THANK YOU FOR ALL.

_________________________________________________________________
Like puzzles? Play free games & earn great prizes. Play Clink now. 
http://club.live.com/clink.aspx?icid=clink_hotmailtextlink2
